listing.descr: Step back in time in the West End of the island with this classic end-unit townhouse, lovingly owned by the same family for over 50 years. Constructed in the 1970s, it retains its original finishes, providing a strong foundation for customization and modern updates. Spread over three stories, the home features two bedrooms and two bathrooms—an ideal chance for a first-time buyer to own a fee simple property and build equity through thoughtful upgrades. Sold as-is, this property presents an excellent opportunity to tailor the space to your vision.

Opportunities abound on this vacant lot located in an established area of Surfside. R-5 zoned with 2,000 square feet of allowable ground cover to build your dream home or investment property. Property is conveniently situated near mid-island shopping, Town and Surfside Beaches. Utilities (water, sewer and conduits for electric) have all been brought to and stubbed at the property.
Not Listed in LINK - Assessors list as store/shop

Centrally located two-bedroom, two-and-a-half-bath condo offering three levels of living space and two parking spaces. This unit is one of three side-by-side residences and features a new roof and a recently painted interior. Low-maintenance ownership with no HOA fees; the master insurance policy is shared among the three units. An ideal in-town opportunity for primary residence, rental investment, or seasonal living.
Not Listed in LINK
Not listed in LINK New. Sub-division
Not Listed in LINK - new sub-division

5 Gray Avenue is a three-lot subdivision in R-10 zoning, which allows for 20% ground cover. Lot 177 is a 10,340± SF, flat and cleared homesite identical in scale to Lot 176, but offered with the advantage of HDC-approved architectural plans—allowing a buyer to move directly into the building phase. Its Mid-Island setting offers effortless connectivity to Surfside’s beaches, Town, and everyday conveniences, making it a streamlined opportunity for anyone seeking a ready-to-build site.
Not Listed in LINK

5 Gray Avenue is a three-lot subdivision in R-10 zoning, which allows for 20% ground cover. Lot 178 is the premier parcel—an expansive 19,406± SF, level and fully cleared lot that offers significant design flexibility and estate-style potential. With nearly double the land area of the front lots, this homesite can accommodate a main house, guest house, pool, and generous outdoor spaces (subject to approvals). Its central location provides easy access to Surfside, Town, and island amenities while delivering rare scale in a quiet Mid-Island setting.

Opportunity to own a piece of commercial land on Nantucket in the CTEC zoning district offering 40% ground cover allowable supporting a variety of options for the visionary buyer. Potential uses include residential, apartment complex, commercial, and agriculture. The property is vacant and defined by split rail fence on the perimiter.
Town Lists as a 4 Family Not Listed in LINK
listing.buyer: US Marine Reif Marine Nantucket Fee LLC

listing.descr: Opportunity knocks! Large lot with over 34,000 sq. ft. and a 2,000+ sq. ft. Cape Cod style structure with attached two-car garage requires a full renovation. This property is presently not habitable, however there are panoramic views from the first and second floor of the Atlantic Ocean and with risk comes reward. Located in the V-R Zoning, the size of the lot allows for 10% ground cover (over 3,400 sq. ft.), with Primary, Secondary and Accessory dwelling allowed by right. Swimming pool possible with Special Permit.
listing.LegalOwner: Family Service Association as conservator for Phillip N. Gallagher Jr.

listing.descr: Not listed in LINK.

A rare and exceptional opportunity to own a prime 2-acre building lot on Nantucket Island. This expansive parcel is high, dry, and free of wetlands—an ideal blank canvas for your dream compound. Surrounded by acres of pristine conservation land, the setting offers unmatched privacy, tranquility, and natural beauty. Viewing stand in place and you cannot even see your abutting neighbors.
With approximately 3,470 square feet of available ground cover, the lot provides ample space for a main residence, guest house, garage, pool, and even a tennis court if desired. Town water is accessible at the street, and an approved 8-bedroom septic design will convey with the sale.
Create a legacy property tailored to your vision in one of the island’s most serene and protected environments. A unique opportunity to build your Nantucket dream estate.
listing.buyer: Town of Nantucket Affordable Housing Trust

listing.descr: Beautiful 1.14-acre site with level topography at 58' of elevation. This three-bedroom home is an early Tom Nevers property, designed for efficiency while also creating a beautiful, open living area that provides abundant natural light and a sense of space. The majority of the property remains uncleared, and the rear half of the property is protected by deer fencing. Zoning permits 2,000 square feet of ground cover, and the site is capable of supporting a conventional five-bedroom septic system. Note: advanced notice required for showings.
Not Listed in LINK

This beautiful, antique six-bedroom, three-bathroom home is ideally situated on North Liberty Street in a highly desirable, central neighborhood. The property sits on an oversized lot, providing ample outdoor space, including a generous backyard. Inside, the home offers a kitchen, living room, dining room, pantry, and a cozy den. Additional features include a one-car attached garage and an extra off-street parking space, making this property both practical and inviting.

Great opportunity for investment or employee housing all new shingles side and roof and some new windows. gas heat all metered separate both electric and gas. This is a side by side duplex. Both sides have a first floor bedroom, kitchen, dining and living room.full bath/laundry room. Second floor has two bedrooms and a hall full bath. Both duplexes have separate full lower level living areas and full baths. Need 24 hr show clause.

The approach to this lovely property is down a hedge-lined driveway, leading to a peaceful and beautifully manicured setting that features a three-bedroom main house and a one-bedroom cottage. The main house was recently expanded and features a first-floor bedroom, as well as generously sized rooms with a design that opens to the outdoors. In addition, thoughtful custom details are featured throughout, including a custom kitchen, a handsome wood-paneled den, and three fireplaces. The one-bedroom cottage is light-filled and offers additional living space for a home office and/or overflow. The property is nearly one acre and benefits from Town water and Town sewer, which will support expansion and additional structures like a garage or pool.
Not Listed in LINK
listing.Amenities: Central A/C, Insulation, Irrigation, Outdoor Shower

listing.descr: A rare opportunity to own an oversized lot in Town with a 5 BR 3.5 BA house with full basement and ample remaining ground cover. This private, historic estate with room for growth its located n a premier in-town location. A true piece of Nantucket history, the Isaiah Folger House (c. 1770) exudes the grace and craftsmanship of 18th-century Nantucket, with original millwork drawings preserved in the home’s archives — a testament to its provenance. The existing floor plan lends itself beautifully being reconfigured to provide additional bedrooms and bathrooms, offering flexibility for modern living. With its spacious layout, dedicated off street parking, and full basement, the home can be comfortably enjoyed as is or reimagined with new decor customized to a new owner’s vision. The property currently offers a footprint of 1420+/- square feet with >800 square feet of remaining ground cover available, presenting an exciting opportunity for expansion or the addition of a second dwelling, subject to local zoning and approvals.
listing.LegalOwner: Timothy and Julianna Mackie / CEDAR & STONE HS LLC

listing.descr: 10 Doc Ryder Drive is located in a charming neighborhood near Miacomet Golf Course, treasured south shore beaches, and hundreds of acres protected by the Nantucket Land Bank. Enjoy an active day nearby or lie low in the well-appointed backyard outfitted with multiple outdoor living spaces and a gunite pool and spa. The house features light-filled open-concept living, dining, and entertainment space on the second floor. A spacious, finished basement with a kitchenette and an attached two-bedroom cottage offers the perfect secondary spaces to round out the property.

A rare opportunity to build your dream beach house on Nantucket’s highly sought-after south shore. This .69-acre parcel comes with approved architectural plans by renowned Workshop/APD, providing a shovel-ready path to creating a custom compound with a main house, guest house, garage, and pool. Located just moments from iconic Nobadeer Beach, 62 Nobadeer Avenue offers sweeping ocean views, breathtaking sunsets, and the sound of surf as your backdrop. Zoned R-20 with 3,750 sq. ft. of allowable ground cover (and additional potential for expansion with further permitting), this site offers generous flexibility for design. Enjoy the best of coastal living with sea breezes, beach access, and proximity to all that Surfside has to offer.

Just minutes from the South Shore beaches yet worlds away, this spectacular Surfside estate offers over 3 acres of unparalleled privacy surrounded by mature trees and natural beauty. The winding driveway leads through a canopy of lush trees to a beautifully remodeled, classic Nantucket home—spacious, serene, and designed for effortless island living.The main level features a sun-drenched living room with a grand vaulted ceiling, wood burning fireplace, and exposed wood beams, flowing seamlessly into the dining area and newly renovated kitchen. With a total of 5 bedrooms, 4 full baths, and 2 powder rooms on three finished floors this property provides the perfect layout for entertaining guests and extended family in a private setting. Outdoors, the property truly shines. The oval swimming pool with hot tub is framed by patios and lush landscaping. A built-in grill, screened porch, and raised vegetable and herb gardens invite al fresco living, while a two-car garage and generous driveway complete this exceptional offering. A rare find in Surfside, 15 Skyline Drive combines coastal proximity, acreage, and total privacy—a timeless island retreat that feels both expansive and intimate, designed to be shared with family and friends for generations to come.

Just minutes from Surfside and Nobadeer beaches, this 3,800 sq. ft. Nantucket home is set on nearly three-quarters of an acre with outstanding outdoor amenities. A heated Gunite pool with integrated spa, bluestone patio, and cabana create a private retreat in the fenced backyard, designed for effortless summer living and entertaining. Inside, three finished levels offer abundant natural light and flexible spaces for family and guests. Mature trees frame the property, while the setting across from 143 acres of State Forest provides both privacy and access to miles of walking and biking trails. With close proximity to the South Shore beaches and the anticipated Lovers Lane bike path project, this Surfside property offers a rare balance of lifestyle and long-term value.

Situated on historic Pine Street, just off the cobblestones of Main, offering the opportunity to live in the heart of downtown Nantucket. This quiet, one-way street is just moments from award-winning restaurants, boutique shopping, and the ferries, placing the best of Town just moments from your door. Its location on one of Nantucket’s most iconic streets makes it a standout opportunity for those seeking convenience, charm, and nearby proximity to the island’s beloved historic landmarks.
listing.LegalOwner: George M. and Regina M. Rich Trust

listing.descr: 6 Harbor Terrace is perched on the water with sweeping views of the Nantucket Harbor. The spacious living and dining areas feature oversized windows and fireplaces, creating a warm, light-filled environment perfect for entertaining. Four bedrooms, including two with harbor vistas. The outdoor area provides a simple, peaceful setting for enjoying the harbor views.

This newly constructed home at 22 Vestal Street is perfectly positioned in town proper, just a short distance from historic downtown Nantucket and the island’s pristine beaches. Built by one of Nantucket’s premier builders, this stunning residence spans over 4,000 square feet and features six bedrooms and four-and-a-half baths. Designed and styled by LTW Design, the home offers a sophisticated yet functional living space, ideal for families and friends to create lasting summer memories.
An open floor plan seamlessly blends indoor and outdoor living, featuring a gourmet kitchen with top-of-the-line appliances, stone countertops, and wide-plank oak floors throughout. Additional highlights include a masonry fireplace, contemporary tile and lighting fixtures, and beautifully manicured landscaping, all thoughtfully curated to enhance this exceptional island retreat.

Your Nantucket sanctuary awaits in one of the island's most desirable enclaves. Welcome to 12 Shimmo Pond Road, where you'll find a 4-Bedroom Main Home and a 2-Bedroom Guest Cottage on expansive grounds. This exceptional property is set on an oversized and private parcel, surrounded by lush gardens and mature trees that create a serene sense of seclusion. Included in this offering is 13 Shimmo Pond Road, located directly across the street, adding to the estate's privacy and potential. Perfectly suited for hosting family and friends or for enjoying private retreat spaces, the property offers peace, comfort, and enduring character. Meandering garden paths, sunny terraces, and shady nooks lend a sense of magic, while the thoughtful layout allows for both quiet solitude and welcoming gatherings. Just a stone’s throw from the shimmering waters of Nantucket Harbor and a short drive from the cobblestone streets of Nantucket Town, this rare offering marries countryside calm with coastal refinement. With approximately 2,000 square feet of ground cover remaining, the possibilities for expansion are plentiful.
listing.Amenities: Alarm, Wood Stove, Insulation, Irrigation, Outdoor Shower

listing.descr: Nestled in the heart of Nantucket, 10 Milk Street was built in 1788 and meticulously restored, preserving its blend of historic charm and roots. Spanning 4,332 square feet of living space, the home comprises 6 bedrooms and 5.5 bathrooms. The residence still features original wood floors, transom doors, and six fireplaces. The kitchen was recently updated in 2024 designed for both functionality and style. The property includes a charming outdoor area, ideal for relaxation and entertaining. Situated just steps from Nantucket's Main Street, the property offers convenient access to local shops, dining, and cultural attractions.

This one-of-a kind property abuts over 300 acres of conservation land and has panoramic views of Long Pond as well as distance views of Nantucket Sound. Private deeded easement with stairs to the beach gives access to gentle surf that is ideal for swimming, boating, paddle boarding and surf casting. Views of the moors change with the colors of the seasons; the open sky gives spectacular sunrises, sunsets and opportunities for star-gazing. The Cape-style house sits on 1.16 acres and was built in the early 70’s as a private oasis for its current family. It has 3 bedrooms and 2.5 bathrooms. There is a full basement for storage. Above the garage is the caretaker’s quarters consisting of one bedroom, a full bath, and an open-concept living, dining, kitchen area and powder room. Landscaping has been kept natural to blend in with the surrounding conservation property.

Nestled on a quiet lane in the heart of historic ’Sconset village, this custom-built residence by acclaimed Shelter 7 offers a refined coastal lifestyle just moments from the beach, shops, and dining. Thoughtfully designed with interiors by Nantucket Looms, the home exudes a clean, fresh aesthetic throughout. Light-filled spaces, timeless finishes, and exceptional craftsmanship come together in a setting that feels both elevated and inviting. The gourmet kitchen opens seamlessly to dining and living areas adorned with crisp millwork and serene tones. Four sets of French doors and a dramatic indoor/outdoor fireplace connect the interior to a lush private garden and tranquil yard, perfect for entertaining or quiet relaxation. A covered front porch provides an idyllic spot to enjoy your morning coffee or an evening breeze. The flexible layout includes a first-floor primary suite, five total bedrooms, five and a half baths, and a beautifully finished lower level, offering space for everyone, whether gathering or retreating. This is a rare opportunity to own a home where comfort meets understated elegance, in one of Nantucket’s most cherished enclaves.

Discover coastal elegance in this timeless 4-bedroom, 3 full and 2 half-bath home featuring 4 fireplaces and sweeping southwest ocean views. Situated just steps from one of Nantucket’s premier South Shore beaches, this property is part of a serene, well-maintained neighborhood near conservation land perfect for walking, biking, and horseback riding along the dunes. Now with approved plans for a pool, this home offers even more potential for luxurious outdoor living. Located only 4 miles from town, it’s an idyllic retreat for those seeking breathtaking sunsets, swimming, surfing, and fishing in a stunning coastal setting.

Anchored between Main Street and Steps Beach, this extraordinary home captures the essence of refined coastal living. Five private ensuite bedrooms provide luxurious comfort for family and guests, while the chef’s kitchen and adjoining dining room invite gatherings both large and intimate. The sun-soaked, south-facing deck extends the living space into a private, landscaped yard, where views of the Lily Pond Conservancy and the town’s iconic church steeples create a remarkable setting in the heart of Town. With three finished floors of living space and quality craftsmanship throughout, 36 West Chester Street is graceful Nantucket living.

Welcome to 27 Fairgrounds Road, Nantucket—a prime opportunity in a thriving area. Sprawling across 67,518 square feet, this property boasts a spacious 5,410 square-foot building currently home to the renowned Fairgrounds Restaurant and Pudley's Pub. With three bathrooms and a versatile layout, the possibilities are endless. Whether you envision continuing the successful restaurant legacy or exploring potential subdivision options, this property offers a multitude of paths forward. Consider the opportunity to create six 10,000+ sq. ft. lots, a combination of three 10,000 sq. ft. lots with two 12,000+ sq. ft. lots, or three expansive 22,000+ sq. ft. lots. This unique offering promises significant potential for the visionary investor. Don’t miss out on this exceptional property.

Ideally located on Cliff Road near Town and Steps Beach, this property offers a classic Nantucket layout with ample space for family and guests. The first floor features a bright, open kitchen, generous living room, and dining area that flow seamlessly for easy entertaining. A king bedroom and full bath on this level provide convenient first-floor living. The second floor includes three additional bedrooms and a shared bath. Above the attached two-car garage is a private guest suite with a full bath—ideal for visitors or extended stays. A wonderful opportunity to enjoy one of Nantucket’s most desirable neighborhoods.

Originally built in the late 1700s, this exceptional property has been masterfully reimagined through the collaborative efforts of Main Street Construction and Mark Cutone Architecture. The result is a seamless fusion of historic preservation and modern luxury. Located just moments from Main Street in the heart of Nantucket’s historic district, the home’s front façade maintains its timeless charm, while the rear opens to sophisticated contemporary living.
A stunning three-story custom staircase, crafted from glass and wood by EeStairs, serves as the visual and architectural centerpiece of the main residence. Spanning four levels, the home features five bedrooms—including one currently utilized as a dressing room—and three elegant living areas, offering a perfect blend of comfort and functionality.
Completed in 2018, the detached studio provides additional space for entertaining and relaxation, all overlooking the private, beautifully landscaped yard. High-end finishes are found throughout both structures, including custom wire-brushed white oak flooring, integrated LED lighting, remote-controlled window treatments, and bespoke cabinetry by Faneuil Cabinetry.
The property also includes two off-street parking spaces and is being offered fully furnished, presenting a rare turnkey opportunity in one of Nantucket’s most coveted locations.

111 Surfside is a compelling Nantucket compound that captures the essence of refined coastal living offering privacy, flexible spaces, and high level amenities. Built in 2023 and set on approximately one acre, 111 Surfside is a nearly new, private coastal compound offering premier finishes, multiple living structures, and resort-style outdoor spaces. The property includes a five-bedroom main residence, a three-level guest cottage and a separate two-car garage with unfinished space above—ideal for storage. Oak flooring runs throughout, and thoughtful architectural details elevate every space. At the center of the compound, a beautifully designed pool, spa, Perlick outdoor kitchen, and fire feature create an exceptional setting for both relaxing or entertaining. A convenient cut-through to the Surfside bike path provides easy access to Surfside Beach just moments away.

Nestled on an expansive 2.45-acre parcel adjoining pristine Nantucket Land Bank conservation land, 24 Flintlock Road offers a private and tranquil retreat for discerning families. The homes on this thoughtfully curated estate create a charming family compound, featuring a generously appointed six-bedroom main residence, complemented by a delightful three-bedroom guest cottage, a stylish pool house, and a garage thoughtfully integrated with a private studio apartment.
Step into a meticulously designed outdoor haven—a true summer oasis ideal for relaxation and entertaining. Enjoy leisurely days beside the striking 20' x 36' heated Gunite pool, accented with elegant bluestone surrounds, or relax in the pool cabana, which seamlessly blends inviting indoor and outdoor living spaces. The compound also features a covered outdoor living room with a vaulted ceiling and impressive oversized fireplace, a fully equipped outdoor kitchen and bar with seating for eight, and multiple seating areas throughout the grounds. Whether hosting large gatherings or seeking a peaceful retreat, this exceptional property offers the perfect environment for memorable Nantucket summers.
Beyond the lush landscaping and carefully tended gardens, this property offers abundant space to expand amenities, including room for a private tennis court. Expertly styled by renowned interior designer Trisha Wynn Designs, the property is presented fully furnished and turnkey-ready, ensuring immediate enjoyment and comfort. With its rare blend of spacious luxury, privacy, and versatility, 24 Flintlock Road is the ideal setting for creating cherished Nantucket memories or leveraging its exceptional rental potential, commanding impressive weekly six-figure rates during selective seasonal periods.

Nearing completion and scheduled for delivery in early 2026, 6 Tautemo Way is a stunning contemporary beach house set on an elevated lot, capturing sweeping views of the Atlantic Ocean, Hummock Pond, and acres of pristine Conservation Land. This exceptional new construction is located less than 300 yards from Cisco Beach, one of Nantucket’s most coveted coastal destinations, and offers effortless access to the island’s charming and historic downtown. The coastal home was thoughtfully conceived and designed to take advantage of the amazing views and is being developed by one of the island's premier teams: Concept Design Architects, Off Shore Development, and Elisa Allen Design. The estate will feature a main house, a heated 18 x 36 gunite pool with sunken 8 x 8 spa surrounded by Bluestone coping and IPE decking, a pool cabana with outdoor kitchen, bar and half bath with convenient access to outdoor shower and, a stand alone 200 sq ft garage for your island vehicle. The main house boasts over 5,500 sq. ft. of luxurious living space across three levels, comprising of 4 bedrooms, 4 full baths, and 4 half baths. Only the finest materials and skilled craftsmen have been employed to create this remarkable property. The interior will showcase exquisite lighting from the Nantucket Light Shop, premium plumbing fixtures from the Nantucket Water Closet, and beautiful stone and tile from the Nantucket Tile Room. Additionally, the home will feature a fully a Sonos sound system in lower level, all controllable via phone, tablet, or dedicated panels throughout. Amplified Wi-Fi will be available throughout the house, along with a PEV charger and a backup generator for added convenience. A furniture package from Nantucket Looms is available at an additional expense. Easy access to Cisco Beach, Hummock Pond Bike Path, Bartlett Farm, Cisco Brewery, Miacomet Golf Club, 167 Raw Seafood, and historic downtown Nantucket.
listing.buyer: Zeta Real Estate Management X LLC

listing.descr: Nestled down a quiet avenue in Monomoy, 6 Berkeley Avenue offers sweeping views of the Creeks, Nantucket Harbor, Town, Brant Point Lighthouse, and Nantucket Sound. This extremely private lot features a five-bedroom, four-bathroom home at a nice elevation, which amplifies its 180-degree views. Positioned for breathtaking sunsets, this property has multiple decks, a screened-in porch, and a spacious yard, making it a serene retreat just moments from Town and steps from the beach. There is significant room for expansion, allowing the new owner to create the Monomoy compound of their dreams. Incredibly rare and sought-after, this property benefits from a view easement and property restriction, further protecting its views and privacy.

Set within the coveted Pocomo enclave, this magnificent estate features a five-bedroom main house, charming three-bedroom guest cottage, and pool house. The remarkable 3.6-acre parcel unfolds with rolling lawn and beautifully landscaped grounds to create a thoughtful balance of water vistas, intimate gathering spaces, and private retreats. Extensive wraparound porches, newly fenced in back yard, oversized two car garage and a thoughtfully designed pool house create effortless indoor-outdoor living anchored by the 20x50 pool and spa. Perhaps most captivating is the deeded harbor access and beach use offering a connection to Nantucket’s beautiful shoreline. Relaxed and sophisticated, this property encompasses the classic elegance of once upon a time. An idyllic, luxurious island estate.
